summary: Iteration 43: Verified all major functional changes - pricing updates, tab removal, report rendering, and legal framework enhancements. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/payments/prices correctly returns: grounds_of_merit=$99, full_report=$150, extensive_report=$200
CaseDetail.jsx has exactly 6 tabs: Documents, Timeline, Grounds, Notes, Reports, Legal - NO Contradictions or Progress tabs
ReportsSection.jsx uses ReactMarkdown with remarkGfm for formatted Markdown rendering
Action buttons (Full Report Page, Barrister View, Export PDF, Print) are at TOP of expanded report card (line 309)
Report type dialog shows correct prices: FREE, $150.00 AUD, $200.00 AUD
LegalFrameworkViewer has 'How to Start Your Appeal' with 6 steps and AustLII link
LegalFrameworkViewer has 'Appeal Forms & Court Registries' with NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, Legal Aid links
All links have ExternalLink icons visible
How It Works page shows updated prices: Quick Summary=Free, Full Detailed=$150 AUD, Extensive Log=$200 AUD
Landing page shows updated pricing ($150, $200) in report samples section

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all public pages verified with correct pricing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified pricing update ($99/$150/$200), tab removal (no Contradictions/Progress), Markdown rendering in reports, and Legal Framework enhancements. All DO NOT UNDO markers preserved. CaseDetail pages require Google OAuth login to access.
